ocr_findings.description: OCR line 3 contains stray '<' character and line 4 contains 'アイエスオー' (furigana reading rendered as a standalone line). The '<' is an artifact; the furigana appearing as a separate line is a minor formatting issue but text is preserved.
HTML entity '<' appears in OCR output (from the decorative section icon '<' symbol at top of page). This is a cosmetic rendering artifact.
Image shows a '非常口' exit sign graphic used as illustrative example — not captured in OCR (expected for image content). No key text is lost.

reviewer_notes: ISO standards page introducing ISO organization and ISO 9000 series. The 4-row ISO 9000 table is accurately reproduced. Main prose including the 'ISO ? IOS ?' supplementary box is faithfully captured. Artifacts are minor: a stray '<' and HTML entity from the decorative section icon, plus furigana 'アイエスオー' rendered as an extra line. No substantive text is lost or corrupted.
